summary: SINGLE_FOCUS: Erdős–Szekeres for r=s=5 (needs N=17 distinct reals). Random permutation of 1..17 plotted as BLUE dots. Compute LIS and LDS via dynamic programming; reveal the longer-or-tied one (GREEN or RED) via ValueTracker k_tr walking dots + connecting lines. Live LIS, LDS lengths + forced-monotonic conclusion.
